debuffs.name: Vulnerable
debuffs.content: Receive 50% more damage from Attacks for X turns.

debuffs.name: Weak
debuffs.content: Attacks deal 25% less damage for X turns.

debuffs.name: Frail
debuffs.content: Gain 25% less Block from cards for X turns.

debuffs.name: Poison
debuffs.content: At the start of its turn, loses X HP, then reduce Poison by 1.

debuffs.name: Doom
debuffs.content: At the end of the enemy turn, if it has X or less HP, it dies.

debuffs.name: Confused
debuffs.content: The costs of your cards are randomized on draw, from 0 to 3.

debuffs.name: Demise
debuffs.content: At the end of its turn, it loses X HP.

debuffs.name: Shrink
debuffs.content: Attacks deal 30% less damage. Removed when the applier dies.

debuffs.name: Shackling Potion
debuffs.content:
Lose X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength loss Mechanically Identical to Mangle , Piercing Wail , Crush Under , Dying Star , Enfeebling Touch , Monarch's Gaze Strength Down , and Dark Shackles

debuffs.name: Mangle
debuffs.content:
Lose X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength loss Mechanically Identical to Shackling Potion , Piercing Wail , Crush Under , Dying Star , Monarch's Gaze Strength Down , and Enfeebling Touch , and Dark Shackles

debuffs.name: Grapple
debuffs.content: Whenever you gain Block this turn, deal X damage to the afflicted enemy.

debuffs.name: Flanking
debuffs.content:
Other allies deal X times more damage to this enemy this turn.
Notes: Multiplayer only.

debuffs.name: Piercing Wail
debuffs.content:
Lose X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength loss Mechanically Identical to Shackling Potion , Mangle , Crush Under , Dying Star , Enfeebling Touch , Monarch's Gaze Strength Down , and Dark Shackles

debuffs.name: No Draw
debuffs.content: You may not draw any more cards this turn.

debuffs.name: Strangle
debuffs.content: Whenever you play a card this turn, this enemy loses X HP.

debuffs.name: Wraith Form
debuffs.content: At the start of your turn, lose X Dexterity .

debuffs.name: Conqueror
debuffs.content: Sovereign Blade deals double damage to it for the next X turns.

debuffs.name: Crush Under
debuffs.content:
Lose X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength loss Mechanically Identical to Shackling Potion , Mangle , Piercing Wail , Dying Star , Monarch's Gaze Strength Down , Enfeebling Touch , and Dark Shackles

debuffs.name: Dying Star
debuffs.content:
Lose X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength loss Mechanically Identical to Shackling Potion , Mangle , Piercing Wail , Crush Under , Monarch's Gaze Strength Down , Enfeebling Touch , and Dark Shackles

debuffs.name: Monarch's Gaze Strength Down
debuffs.content:
Lose X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength loss Mechanically Identical to Shackling Potion , Mangle , Piercing Wail , Crush Under , Dying Star , Enfeebling Touch , and Dark Shackles

debuffs.name: Debilitate
debuffs.content: Vulnerable and Weak are twice as effective for the next X turns.

debuffs.name: Enfeebling Touch
debuffs.content:
Lose X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength loss Mechanically Identical to Shackling Potion , Mangle , Piercing Wail , Crush Under , Dying Star , Monarch's Gaze Strength Down , and Dark Shackles

debuffs.name: Hang
debuffs.content:
All Hangs deal X times more damage to this enemy.
Notes: Stacks multiplicatively (minimum +2 per application). Capped at 999.

debuffs.name: Neurosurge
debuffs.content: At the start of your turn, apply X Doom to yourself.

debuffs.name: Oblivion
debuffs.content: Whenever you play a card, this enemy gains X Doom .

debuffs.name: Sic 'Em
debuffs.content: Whenever Osty hits this enemy this turn, Summon X.

debuffs.name: Biased Cognition
debuffs.content: At the start of your turn, lose X Focus .

debuffs.name: Dark Shackles
debuffs.content:
Lose X Strength until the end of this turn.
Notes: Temporary Strength loss Mechanically Identical to Shackling Potion , Mangle , Piercing Wail , Crush Under , Dying Star , Monarch's Gaze Strength Down , and Enfeebling Touch .

debuffs.name: Knockdown
debuffs.content:
Other allies deal X times more damage to this enemy this turn.
Notes: Multiplayer only.

debuffs.name: No Block
debuffs.content: You cannot gain Block from cards for X turns.

debuffs.name: Tag Team
debuffs.content: The next Attack another player plays on the enemy is played an extra time.

debuffs.name: The Gambit
debuffs.content: If you take unblocked attack damage this combat, die.

debuffs.name: Chains of Binding
debuffs.content: The first X cards drawn each turn are Afflicted with Bound.

debuffs.name: Constrict
debuffs.content: While the Slithering Strangler is alive, at the end of your turn, take X damage.

debuffs.name: Dampen
debuffs.content: While Magi Knight is alive, ALL your cards are Downgraded.

debuffs.name: Disintegration
debuffs.content: At the end of your turn, take X damage.

debuffs.name: Hex
debuffs.content: While Spectral Knight is alive, ALL your cards are Ethereal .

debuffs.name: Imbalanced
debuffs.content: If the enemy's attacks are fully blocked, it becomes Stunned .

debuffs.name: Magic Bomb
debuffs.content: Take X damage at the end of your turn. Is cleared if the Magi Knight dies.

debuffs.name: Mind Rot
debuffs.content: Draw X fewer cards each turn.

debuffs.name: Plow
debuffs.content: The first time this enemy's HP reaches X or below, it becomes Stunned and loses all its Strength .

debuffs.name: Ringing
debuffs.content: You can only play 1 card this turn.

debuffs.name: Shriek
debuffs.content: The first time this enemy's HP reaches X or below, it becomes Stunned .

debuffs.name: Sloth
debuffs.content: You cannot play more than X cards each turn.

debuffs.name: Slow
debuffs.content: Whenever you play a card, this enemy receives 10% more damage from Attacks this turn.

debuffs.name: Smoggy
debuffs.content: You can only play 1 Skill per turn.

debuffs.name: Surrounded
debuffs.content: Receive 50% more damage if attacked from behind. Use targeting cards or potions to change your orientation.

debuffs.name: Tangled
debuffs.content: Attacks cost an additional for 2 turns.

debuffs.name: Tender
debuffs.content: Whenever you play a card, lose X Strength and X Dexterity this turn.

debuffs.name: Waste Away
debuffs.content: Gain X less per turn.
